user.title: Generac PWRcell — Account login
user.description: Enter your Generac / PWRview account credentials (same as the PWRcell mobile app).

data_description.api_base: Leave as default unless you are running a local mock server for testing.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials — check your email and password.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach the Generac API. Check your internet connection or API base URL.
error.no_sensors: Authenticated successfully, but no sensors were found on this account.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This PWRcell account is already configured.
